details01: In the pursuit of a hunger-free Bangladesh, we distribute free food every week. Additionally, we organize mid-day meals in schools to encourage children to focus on their studies and help reduce dropout rates, working towards a hunger-free golden Bangladesh.
details02: Upon receiving information, we cover all the expenses for hospital treatment for helpless patients. We also organize regular medical camps in densely populated areas to achieve a healthy and clean Bangladesh.
details03: Through one of Dipayon's initiatives, WooderBD, we have created new employment opportunities. By providing advanced training and support to start new businesses, we have brought smiles to 148 families, playing a key role in their transformation.
details04: Dipayon works with a 'School of Humanity' four days a week for street children, with ongoing efforts for establishing a permanent school.
details05: During the summer water crisis, we deliver safe drinking water to disadvantaged communities as part of our mission to eliminate water scarcity.
details06: Since the beginning, Dipayon has worked to rehabilitate all helpless people. So far, we have rehabilitated 19 individuals and are expanding our organizational capacity in this area.
